news.title:
BoB predicts rupee may trade below 92/$ if US-Israel war prolongs.
Rising oil prices may push inflation by 0.2-0.4%, impacting fiscal deficit.
news.summary:
BoB predicts rupee may trade below 92/$ if US-Israel war prolongs.
Rising oil prices may push inflation by 0.2-0.4%, impacting fiscal deficit.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda report indicates oil surge may raise WPI by 1%.
Oil rise could widen CAD, impacting economic metrics significantly.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda report indicates oil surge may raise WPI by 1%.
Oil rise could widen CAD, impacting economic metrics significantly.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda raised Rs 10,000 crore via Series I green infra bonds.
The 7-year bond saw bids worth Rs 16,415 crore on NSE platform.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda raised Rs 10,000 crore via Series I green infra bonds.
The 7-year bond saw bids worth Rs 16,415 crore on NSE platform.

news.title: Bank of Baroda issues and allocates bonds valued at ₹100 billion.
news.summary: Bank of Baroda issues and allocates bonds valued at ₹100 billion.

news.title:
Sidbi canceled its ₹8,000 crore bond issue due to high yield bids.
Investor bids totaled ₹5,079 crore, with yields at 7.28%-7.44%.
news.summary:
Sidbi canceled its ₹8,000 crore bond issue due to high yield bids.
Investor bids totaled ₹5,079 crore, with yields at 7.28%-7.44%.

news.title:
Bank Nifty falls 2% as Middle East conflict drives oil surge; PSU banks lead losses.
Rupee hits a record low of 92.17; crude rise impacts CAD, fiscal deficit, inflation for India.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty falls 2% as Middle East conflict drives oil surge; PSU banks lead losses.
Rupee hits a record low of 92.17; crude rise impacts CAD, fiscal deficit, inflation for India.

news.title:
SC rules unsuccessful bidders can't challenge lenders' decisions in IBC matters, citing value erosion and delays.
CoC approved SEML's Rs 1,950 crore bid for SKS Power; appeals by Torrent, Jindal Power dismissed.
news.summary:
SC rules unsuccessful bidders can't challenge lenders' decisions in IBC matters, citing value erosion and delays.
CoC approved SEML's Rs 1,950 crore bid for SKS Power; appeals by Torrent, Jindal Power dismissed.

news.title:
S&P Global Ratings assigned BBB long-term and A-2 short-term ratings to Bank of Baroda with a stable outlook.
No prior rating details or reasons for changes were disclosed.
news.summary:
S&P Global Ratings assigned BBB long-term and A-2 short-term ratings to Bank of Baroda with a stable outlook.
No prior rating details or reasons for changes were disclosed.

news.title:
Bank Nifty fell 500 points, down 0.8% at 60,717; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank led losses.
PSU banks like SBI, BoB saw limited losses; India VIX rose 4%, signalling higher volatility.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty fell 500 points, down 0.8% at 60,717; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank led losses.
PSU banks like SBI, BoB saw limited losses; India VIX rose 4%, signalling higher volatility.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda plans to raise ₹10,000 cr via green infra bonds on Mar 4.
Bonds rated AAA with stable outlook, aimed at funding eco-friendly projects like renewable energy.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda plans to raise ₹10,000 cr via green infra bonds on Mar 4.
Bonds rated AAA with stable outlook, aimed at funding eco-friendly projects like renewable energy.

news.title:
Indian banks' bond holdings near regulatory minimum, prompting renewed purchases; net 225.8B INR bonds bought in February.
Bank of Baroda's Mohanty expects bond yields to drop 10-15 bps as demand revives, benefiting India's debt market.
news.summary:
Indian banks' bond holdings near regulatory minimum, prompting renewed purchases; net 225.8B INR bonds bought in February.
Bank of Baroda's Mohanty expects bond yields to drop 10-15 bps as demand revives, benefiting India's debt market.

news.title:
CARE Ratings assigns CARE AAA Stable to Bank of Baroda's Green bonds, reaffirming other ratings.
Ratings highlight Govt ownership, strong franchise, stable asset quality, and capitalisation.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings assigns CARE AAA Stable to Bank of Baroda's Green bonds, reaffirming other ratings.
Ratings highlight Govt ownership, strong franchise, stable asset quality, and capitalisation.

news.title:
ICRA assigned 'AAA/Stable' rating to Bank of Baroda's long-term green infrastructure bonds, reaffirming existing ratings.
BoB's strong capital position and improved asset quality support profitability despite NIM decline in 9M FY2026.
news.summary:
ICRA assigned 'AAA/Stable' rating to Bank of Baroda's long-term green infrastructure bonds, reaffirming existing ratings.
BoB's strong capital position and improved asset quality support profitability despite NIM decline in 9M FY2026.

news.title:
Fitch reaffirms Bank of Baroda and NZ branch rating at 'BBB-'.
Viability rating for Bank of Baroda upgraded to 'BB' by Fitch.
news.summary:
Fitch reaffirms Bank of Baroda and NZ branch rating at 'BBB-'.
Viability rating for Bank of Baroda upgraded to 'BB' by Fitch.

news.title:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.
news.summary:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.

news.title:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.
news.summary:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda confirmed interest payment of Rs. 1892.5M for BOB XXVI NCD series due on 23-02-2026.
The NCDs have an AAA (Stable) rating by CRISIL and India Ratings, ensuring creditworthiness.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda confirmed interest payment of Rs. 1892.5M for BOB XXVI NCD series due on 23-02-2026.
The NCDs have an AAA (Stable) rating by CRISIL and India Ratings, ensuring creditworthiness.

news.title:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.
news.summary:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.

news.title:
Investors shift from CPs to CDs due to rising CD issuances and rates.
Banks are issuing CDs to address deposit tightness, boosting their appeal.
news.summary:
Investors shift from CPs to CDs due to rising CD issuances and rates.
Banks are issuing CDs to address deposit tightness, boosting their appeal.

news.title:
India's CPI retail inflation rose to 2.75% in Jan 2026, using 2024 as base year.
December inflation, based on the 2012 series, was recorded at 1.33%.
news.summary:
India's CPI retail inflation rose to 2.75% in Jan 2026, using 2024 as base year.
December inflation, based on the 2012 series, was recorded at 1.33%.
